mapper.select: SELECT ID, ASSET_NAME, TX_TYPE, BUY_PRICE, QUANTITY, COMMISSION, CURRENCY, EXCHANGE, TO_CHAR(BUY_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS BUY_DATE, MEMO FROM INVESTMENT WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY BUY_DATE DESC, ID DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO INVESTMENT ( ASSET_NAME, TX_TYPE, BUY_PRICE, QUANTITY, COMMISSION, CURRENCY, EXCHANGE, BUY_DATE, MEMO, MEMBER_ID ) VALUES ( #{assetName}, #{txType}, #{buyPrice}, #{quantity}, #{commission}, #{currency}, #{exchange},
TO_DATE(#{buyDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
SYSDATE
, #{memo}, #{memberId, javaType=java.lang.Long, jdbcType=NUMERIC} )
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(ID) AS id, ASSET_NAME AS assetName, SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE = 'BUY' THEN QUANTITY ELSE -QUANTITY END) AS totalQuantity, AVG(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE = 'BUY' THEN BUY_PRICE END) AS avgPrice FROM INVESTMENT WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' GROUP BY ASSET_NAME HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE = 'BUY' THEN QUANTITY ELSE -QUANTITY END) > 0
SELECT ID, ASSET_NAME, TX_TYPE, BUY_PRICE, QUANTITY, TO_CHAR(BUY_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS BUY_DATE, MEMO, COMMISSION, CURRENCY, EXCHANGE FROM INVESTMENT WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE INVESTMENT SET ASSET_NAME = #{assetName}, TX_TYPE = #{txType}, BUY_PRICE = #{buyPrice}, QUANTITY = #{quantity}, BUY_DATE = TO_DATE(#{buyDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), MEMO = #{memo}, COMMISSION = #{commission}, CURRENCY = #{currency}, EXCHANGE = #{exchange} WHERE ID = #{id}
